nav.manageCharsHint: Click a character to toggle tracking

characters.title: My Characters
characters.hint: Star the characters you want to track on the dashboard.
characters.empty: No characters found. Click 'Sync characters' on the dashboard to load your Battle.net roster.

landing.subtitle: Personalized planner generated directly from your character data. Vault thresholds, M+ prioritization, and crafting profit – all in one place.
landing.disclaimer: Securely signed in via Blizzard OAuth. We only read character profile data.
landing.footer: Not affiliated with Blizzard Entertainment or World of Warcraft.

vault.title: Vault Tracker
vault.description: Clear visualization of all 9 Vault slots. M+, Raid, Delve – know exactly what's missing.

priority.title: Priority Engine
priority.description: Algorithm calculates the nearest Vault threshold and sorts tasks by actual ilvl impact.

multichar.title: Multi-char
multichar.description: All characters on the account on one dashboard. Switch with one click.

empty.title: No characters
empty.description: Click 'Sync characters' above to load all your characters from your Battle.net account.

noTracked.title: No tracked characters
noTracked.description: Click your username in the top-right corner to open the character panel and star the characters you want to track.

character.neverSynced: Never synced – download data from Blizzard API

mp-vault-slot.title: {count}× M+ run
mp-vault-slot.reason: Unlock next Vault slot ({ilvl} ilvl). You are {gap} ilvl below Heroic cap – every slot counts.

mp-key-push.title: Push to +{level}
mp-key-push.reason: +{gain} ilvl in Vault for one extra run.

raid-vault-slot.title: Heroic raid – {count}× boss
raid-vault-slot.reason: {count} boss(es) remaining for next Raid Vault slot (623 ilvl).

delve-vault-slot.title: {count}× Tier 8+ Delve
delve-vault-slot.reason: Quick content, unlocks Delve Vault slot (616 ilvl).

crafting-cooldowns.title: Crafting cooldowns
crafting-cooldowns.reason: Check Alchemy and Enchanting weekly CD. Flasks and enchants always sell.
